app_building.name: Building Permit Application
app_building.description: Required for most construction-related permits involving structural work, site improvements, or general building scope. This application captures project details, ownership information, contractor information, and overall scope of work.

app_electrical.name: Electrical Permit Application
app_electrical.description: Required for permits involving electrical work, including new installations, modifications, repairs, or service changes. This application documents system details, load information, and contractor information.

app_mechanical.name: Mechanical Permit Application
app_mechanical.description: Required for permits involving mechanical systems such as HVAC equipment, ventilation, and refrigeration. This application includes system details, equipment specifications, and contractor information.

app_plumbing.name: Plumbing Permit Application
app_plumbing.description: Required for permits involving plumbing systems, including water, sewer, gas, and irrigation. This application captures system scope, fixture details, and contractor information.

app_engineering.name: Engineering Permit Application
app_engineering.description: Required for permits involving civil or site-related work such as paving, drainage, utilities, and right-of-way improvements. This application includes project scope, engineering details, and contractor information.

app_floodplain.name: Floodplain Permit Application
app_floodplain.description: Required for projects located within or affecting a designated flood zone. This application is used to evaluate compliance with floodplain management regulations, including elevation, drainage, and flood protection requirements.

app_fire.name: Fire Plan Review Application
app_fire.description: Required for projects in Multi-Family Buildings, Commericial, and Condominiums.

app_landscape.name: Tree Permit Application
app_landscape.description: Required when proposed work impacts trees, including removal, relocation, or protection. This application documents tree disposition and ensures compliance with landscaping and environmental regulations.

app_zoning.name: Zoning Compliance Application
app_zoning.description: Required to verify that the proposed work complies with zoning regulations, including use, setbacks, height, lot coverage, and site layout. This application is typically required for most permits prior to approval.

form_easement.name: Easement Agreements
form_easement.description:
Required when proposed work is located within a utility or drainage easement.

A completed Easement Agreement must be signed by each utility provider with facilities in the easement. To obtain signatures, send the agreement, a property survey, and a sketch of the proposed work to each utility for review. Contact information for each provider is included within the form.

form_special_inspector.name: Special Inspector Form
form_special_inspector.description:
Required when a project involves threshold buildings or requires special inspections per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

A Special Inspector is a licensed professional (Engineer or Architect) responsible for performing independent inspections of critical structural elements to ensure compliance with approved plans and applicable building codes. The inspector provides oversight, submits inspection reports, and certifies that the work meets code requirements.

permits.name: A/C Change Out
permits.whenPermitRequired: A Mechanical Permit is required for the installation, alteration, or major repair of any residential or commercial air conditioning system, but not for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety; this list applies to system changeouts (replacements) only and not to the addition of new units.

items.label: A/C Replacement Data Form
items.description: Unfiform Broward County form for replacing A/C Systems, and detailing Existing and New Unit specs.

items.label: AHRI certificate
items.description: An AHRI Certificate is required to verify that HVAC equipment meets tested efficiency and performance ratings for code compliance.

items.label: Attachments Details
items.description: Provide attachment details for outdoor equipment using one of the following: Florida Product Approval, Miami-Dade NOA, or signed and sealed engineered plans.

permits.name: Additions
permits.whenPermitRequired: The lateral or vertical extension, or increase in floor area or height of a structure, requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Submit Broward County Uniform Permit Application (Building Box Checked). Separate applications may be required for windows/doors/shutters and roofing.

items.label: HVHZ Roofing Application
items.description: Required for roofing work. Submit High Velocity Hurricane Zone (HVHZ) Permit Application.
Submit Broward County Uniform Permit Application (Other Box Checked) for floodplain review.
Separate applications may be required for low voltage (data/cable) and burglar alarm systems.
Required if plumbing work is included.
Required if trees are impacted. Tree protection plan and details may be required.

items.label: Broward County Approvals (Commercial)
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval required. Submit through Broward ePermits OneStop.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems. Must be reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat loads, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Submit signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Submit signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report with foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including survey, floor plans, foundation plans, elevations, sections, structural details, window/door schedules, HVAC plans, electrical plans, riser diagrams, plumbing plans, isometrics, and landscape plans.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan (If Applicable)
items.description: Provide tree protection plan and details when trees are located adjacent to the work area.

items.label: Fire Inspections (If applicable)
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Asphalt & Restriping
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or repair of asphalt surfaces requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide a contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Survey or site plan showing the location, type, size, and details of the proposed work.

items.label: Engineering Standard Details
items.description: Provide applicable engineering standard details for the proposed paving and striping work.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are adjacent to the work area, including protection details.

permits.name: Awning / Canopy
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of an awning or canopy requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: Certificate of Flame Resistance
items.description: Provide documentation showing the awning or canopy material meets flame resistance requirements.

items.label: Product Approvals or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approval, or signed and sealed construction plans detailing the scope of work.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide a survey or site plan showing the location of the proposed awning or canopy.

permits.name: Backflow Preventer
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a backflow preventer requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: Must include backflow preventer type (RPZ, DC, PVB, etc.), use (domestic, irrigation, fire, etc.), and size.

items.label: Test & Maintenance Report
items.description: Registration with BSI Online Tracking is required prior to final inspection. The backflow preventer must be registered, and a completed City of Pompano Beach Backflow Prevention Assembly Test and Maintenance Report must be available on-site at the time of final inspection.

permits.name: Building Shell
permits.whenPermitRequired: The construction of a building shell requires a Building Permit. Separate permits are required for interior buildouts or tenant units.

items.description: If applicable
Required for irrigation systems

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit a completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems, reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report for foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Threshold and/or special inspector form required when applicable per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including civil plans, site plans, survey, elevations, foundation plans, floor plans, structural plans and calculations, fire alarm plans, fire sprinkler plans, mechanical plans, electrical site lighting and photometric plans, plumbing plans, irrigation plans, CPTED plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

permits.name: Burglar Alarm (Hard Wired)
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of a hard wired burglar alarm system requires an Electrical Permit.

items.label: Alarm Registration
items.description: If the alarm system is not registered, submit a completed Alarm Registration Application.

permits.name: Carport Enclosure
permits.whenPermitRequired: The enclosure of a carport or construction of a garage requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval with all elements identified.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide Manual J heat load calculations and energy calculations.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of plans including survey, floor plan, building elevations, structural details, window and door schedule, HVAC plans, and electrical plans.

permits.name: Cell Tower
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation, upgrade, or replacement of a cell tower requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for commercial projects

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required for inspections in accordance with Florida Statutes and local amendments.

items.label: Structural Analysis
items.description: Provide structural analysis and calculations for the tower.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a complete set of plans including site plan, elevations, mounting details, electrical plans, and equipment grounding details.

permits.name: Change of Use
permits.whenPermitRequired:
A Change of Use permit is required when Planning and Zoning determines that the use or occupancy of a building or tenant space has changed. This process allows the Building Department to verify that the existing construction, layout, and life safety systems comply with current code requirements for the proposed use prior to issuing a new Certificate of Occupancy.

A Change of Use permit may only be issued when NO construction work is required. If alterations are necessary to meet the requirements of the new occupancy, a standard building permit must be obtained instead.

items.label: Life Safety Plan
items.description: Provide a life safety plan showing construction type, occupancy classification, occupant load, fire ratings, exits, travel distances, emergency lighting, exit signage, fire protection systems, and exit capacities.

items.label: Floor Plan
items.description: Provide a floor plan showing existing and proposed conditions.

permits.name: Commercial Building
permits.whenPermitRequired: The construction of a commercial building requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application

items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for all applicable systems, including supporting documentation, installation manuals, and calculations.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

permits.name: Flooring / Sound Barrier
permits.whenPermitRequired: A Flooring Permit is required for installation of new flooring in condominium units or similar dwellings located above another unit or service area. Ground floor units, single-family homes, and commercial spaces do not require a permit.

items.label: Acoustic Test Report

permits.name: Foundation Only

items.label: Maintenance of Traffic Plan

items.label: Phased Permit Acknowledgment
items.description: Foundation-only permits are issued at applicant risk prior to full building approval. Additional corrections may be required to meet code.

items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing location of exterior equipment.

items.label: Energy & Load Calculations
items.description: Provide heat load calculations, AHRI certificate, and tie-down/attachment details.

items.label: HVAC & Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide plans showing complete scope of mechanical and electrical work.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide equipment manufacturer specification sheets.

permits.name: Mobile Home
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of a mobile home requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Property Owner Authorization
items.description: Provide notarized letter from property owner granting permission to install the mobile home.

items.label: Survey, Site Plan & Elevation Certificates
items.description: Provide survey/site plan and elevation certificates showing location, size, setbacks, and elevation of the structure.

items.label: Foundation & Tie-Down Details
items.description: Provide foundation design including tie-down system and minimum elevation requirements in NAVD where applicable.

items.label: Product Approvals & Equipment Attachment
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade NOA for exposed mechanical equipment and tie-down details.

items.label: Construction Documents
items.description: Provide installation instructions, manufacturer specifications, anchoring details, electrical riser diagrams, and finish floor elevation details.

permits.name: Pool Heater (Commercial)
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a commercial pool heater requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: Additional plumbing application required for gas heaters

items.label: Survey
items.description: Provide survey showing the location of the pool heater.

items.label: Pool Piping Diagram
items.description: Provide pool piping diagram and system details.

items.label: Anchoring Detail
items.description: Provide anchoring detail including bracket type, screw type, size, length, count, and locations. Must be from manufacturer or signed and sealed by a structural engineer.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans (If applicable)
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing gas piping layout, total developed length, BTU loads, materials, and sizing per FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide installation instructions showing required clearances for maintenance and servicing.

items.label: Health Department Approval
items.description: For commercial pools with 33 or more units, provide Broward County Health Department review comments/approval letter. For 32 units or less, provide exemption letter.

items.label: DPEP Approval
items.description: Development Permit Engineering Program (DPEP) approval is required.

permits.name: Plumbing Tunnel Job
permits.whenPermitRequired: Excavation below a foundation for pipe or drain replacement requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Floor/Site Plan
items.description: Provide plan showing the location of proposed work, clearly label areas to be replaced (e.g., kitchen, bathroom, etc.), and indicate whether the permit is for building drains only or for building drains and sewer. If sewer connection is included, provide a 6-inch cleanout at the City connection.

permits.name: Racking System
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of a racking system in a commercial building requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, and Transportation Concurrency Certificate (if applicable).

items.label: Construction Floor Plans
items.description: Provide floor plans including storage layout, structural connection details, fire sprinkler and alarm systems, and electrical plans with calculations if applicable.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Reroof
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a roofing system requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor repairs that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: HVHZ Permit Application
items.description: High Velocity Hurricane Zone Uniform Permit Application with required attachments.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for roofing materials, underlayments, fasteners, adhesives, and Fire Directory listing pages.

items.label: Asbestos Certificate
items.description: Broward County Asbestos Certificate of Submittal.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Required for multi-family, condominium, and commercial projects. Must show staging areas, fire access, and equipment locations.

items.label: Wind Load Verification
items.description: Provide wind load compliance using prescriptive charts or engineer-sealed calculations depending on project type.

items.label: Roofing Affidavit for Wind Mitigation
items.description: Required for single-family and duplex structures confirming roof-to-wall compliance.

items.label: Rooftop Equipment Affidavit
items.description: Required when rooftop-mounted equipment is present.

items.label: Insulation Attachment Calculations
items.description: Required when installing insulation boards to demonstrate fastening and uplift compliance.

items.label: Withdrawal Resistance Test
items.description: Required when verifying deck or fastener pull-out strength.

items.label: Moisture Survey Report
items.description: Required for roof recover or renovation projects to confirm substrate condition.

items.label: HOA/Condo Authorization Letter
items.description: Required when work is performed on properties governed by an HOA or condominium association.

permits.name: Reuse Connection
permits.whenPermitRequired: The transfer of irrigation from potable water to the City’s reuse connection requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Reuse Connection Application
items.description: Submit completed Reclaimed Water Connection Application/Permit and Hold Harmless Agreement:

items.label: Backflow & Thermal Expansion
items.description: Provide a backflow preventer at the domestic water meter and a thermal expansion valve (unless a tankless water heater is installed). Both must be shown on submitted drawings.

permits.name: Seawall
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a seawall requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Environmental Resource License
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Resource General License.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if pile installation is utilized.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location of the proposed seawall.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans detailing the scope of work.

permits.name: Septic to Sewer Conversion
permits.whenPermitRequired: The conversion from a septic system to a municipal sewer connection requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Broward Environmental Review Approval
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Review Approval Certificate.

items.label: Broward Septic to Sewer Approval
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Septic to Sewer Approval Certificate.

items.label: Sewer Connection Drawing
items.description: Provide drawing showing sewer connection including 6-inch cleanout up to grade at sewer lateral if not already installed.

items.label: Septic Tank Abandonment
items.description: Abandon existing septic tank in accordance with Broward County requirements.

permits.name: Shutters
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of shutters requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: Product Approval
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval with all elements identified.

items.label: Plan Showing Installation
items.description: Provide plan showing location, size, and type of shutters.

items.label: Association Approval
items.description: Required for condominium or HOA projects.

items.label: Wind Load Compliance
items.description: Provide site-specific design wind loads (for buildings over 30 feet) or use Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart for buildings under 30 feet.

items.label: Window & Door Schedule
items.description: Submit Broward County Uniform Retrofit Window & Door Schedule.

items.label: Catwalk Clearance Documentation
items.description: If applicable, provide photo showing door clearance where adjacent catwalks exist.

permits.name: Sign
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a sign requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if the sign is illuminated or has electrical components.

items.label: Sign Code Compliance Application
items.description: Submit a completed Sign Code Compliance Permit Application.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing the location and dimensions of the sign.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans including footing details, mounting details, engineering details, calculations, and specifications.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed electrical plans or plans with contractor qualifier notarization.

permits.name: Site Work
permits.whenPermitRequired: Site work associated with a building project requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for sub-surface enhancement work
Required for site lighting
Required for irrigation and on-site plumbing

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Civil & Site Plans
items.description: Submit civil plans, site plans, survey, lighting plans, photometric plans, irrigation plans, CPTED plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsoil report.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if pile or vibro-replacement installation is utilized.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ON SITE FIRE HYDRANT

permits.name: Solar Systems (Photovoltaic)
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of solar (photovoltaic) systems requires applicable Building and Electrical permits.

items.description: Required for mounting panels
Required for photovoltaic systems

items.label: FSEC Approval or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Florida Solar Energy Center (FSEC) system approval report or signed and sealed engineered drawings.

items.label: Roof Plan
items.description: Scaled roof plan showing location of solar panel installation.

items.label: Attachment & Structural Details
items.description: Provide attachment, flashing, and structural design details for wind loads and site conditions.

items.label: Solar Thermal System Documents
items.description: Plumbing riser diagram and manufacturer specifications for panels, pumps, frames, and mounting systems.

items.label: Photovoltaic System Documents
items.description: Electrical diagrams showing array configuration, wiring, overcurrent protection, inverter, disconnects, grounding, and interconnection details.

items.label: Battery Backup (If applicable)
items.description: Provide standby load summary including power ratings and estimated energy consumption.

items.label: Electrical Calculations
items.description: Provide calculations for conductor sizing, conduit fill, and ambient temperature derating.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Specification sheets and installation manuals for all system components.

permits.name: Special Event
permits.whenPermitRequired: An approved special event requires a permit to be issued.

items.description: Structural application required for temporary structures

items.label: Approved Special Event Form
items.description: Provide a copy of the approved Special Event Form with all required signatures.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing layout including canopies, fencing, and dimensions.

items.label: Flame Retardant Certificates
items.description: Provide flame retardant certification for all canopies.

items.label: Tie-Down Engineering
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans for anchoring and tie-down details.

items.label: Life Safety Layout
items.description: Provide plans showing seating arrangement, fire extinguishers, exits, and occupancy layout.

items.label: Business Tax Receipt
items.description: Provide a valid business tax receipt.

permits.name: Storage Shed
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a storage shed requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if electrical work is included

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the storage shed.

items.label: Product Approval or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approval, or signed and sealed construction plans.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram if electrical work is included.

permits.name: Single Family Residence (New)
permits.whenPermitRequired: The construction of a new single-family residence or duplex requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit a completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems, reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report with foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including survey, site plan, floor plans, foundation plans, elevations, sections, structural details, window/door schedules, HVAC plans, electrical plans, riser diagrams, plumbing plans, isometrics, irrigation plans, and landscape plans.

permits.name: Swimming Pool (New)
permits.whenPermitRequired: The construction of a new swimming pool requires a permit.

items.description: Structural application required for pool construction

items.label: Pool Safety Act Form
items.description: Submit completed Residential Swimming Pool, Spa and Hot Tub Safety Act form.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsoil report and Special Inspector Form if required.

items.label: Plans and Diagrams
items.description: Provide site plan, electrical plan, pool plan, piping diagram, and construction details.

items.label: Gas System Documentation
items.description: If applicable, provide gas piping plans with isometric drawings, BTU loads, and manufacturer specifications for heaters or heat pumps.

items.label: Electrical Compliance
items.description: Electrical plans must comply with NEC 680 requirements.

permits.name: Tankless Water Heater
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a tankless water heater requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Water Heater Replacement Data Form
items.description: Submit completed Broward County Dwelling Unit Water Heater Replacement Data Form.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing gas piping layout, total developed length, BTU loads, materials, and connection points in compliance with FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide specification sheets and installation instructions showing third-party certification compliance.

items.label: Electrical Riser Diagram
items.description: Provide riser diagram showing service size, circuitry, conductor sizes, panel schedule, and grounding system.

permits.name: Temporary Construction Fence
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of a temporary construction fence requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location, height, type of fence, and access gates.

permits.name: Temporary Construction / Sales Trailer
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation of a temporary construction or sales trailer requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if trailer includes restroom facilities
Required for erosion control (sales trailers)
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Zoning Board Approval
items.description: Temporary Permit Approval from the Zoning Board of Appeals and Development Order signed by the Zoning Director (for sales trailers).

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, and Transportation Concurrency Certificate.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan with location, size, setbacks, and elevation details of the trailer.

items.label: Construction Documents
items.description: Provide installation instructions, anchoring details, electrical riser diagrams, and finish floor elevation details.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade NOA for anchoring, mechanical equipment, and (for sales trailers) windows, doors, storefronts, and shutters.

items.label: Plumbing Layout
items.description: Provide plan showing water service, backflow, sewer, or holding tank locations if plumbing is included.

permits.name: Tiki / Chickee Hut
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a tiki or chickee hut requires a Building Permit unless the chickee hut is constructed by a member of the Seminole Tribe and qualifies for the Building Permit exemption.
permits.hint: A chickee hut constructed by a member of the Seminole Tribe is exempt from the Building Permit requirement. Zoning Compliance is still required.

items.description: Required for tiki huts and for chickee huts unless the chickee hut is constructed by a member of the Seminole Tribe and qualifies for the Building Permit exemption.
Required if electrical work is included
Required if plumbing work is included
Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are affected or adjacent to work area
Required for all tiki and chickee huts, including chickee huts exempt from the Building Permit requirement.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the tiki or chickee hut.

items.label: Tribal Identification
items.description: Required only when claiming the Seminole Tribe Building Permit exemption for a chickee hut.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram if electrical work is included.

items.label: Building Inspections (If Building Permit is required)

permits.name: Townhomes (Site, Shell, and Units)
permits.whenPermitRequired: Townhome developments are permitted under a multi-permit structure including a Site Permit, Master Building Permit, and individual Unit Permits.

items.label: Site Permit
items.description: Includes all site-related work such as paving, parking, lighting, irrigation, landscaping, fencing, and CPTED requirements.

items.label: Master Building Permit
items.description: Includes full building plans and documents for the entire structure, including shell and all units.

items.label: Townhome Unit Permits
items.description: Used for final Certificate of Occupancy and unit-specific documentation.

items.label: Site Plans
items.description: Include site plan, survey, lighting plans, irrigation plans, landscaping plans, CPTED plans, and fire alarm monitoring plans.

items.label: Building Plans
items.description: Include architectural, structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire sprinkler, and fire alarm plans.

items.label: Unit Identification Plans
items.description: Provide floor plan identifying each specific unit for unit permits.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approvals for roofing, windows, doors, and other structural components.

items.label: Structural Calculations
items.description: Provide full structural calculations, truss drawings, and shop drawings.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Provide geotechnical/subsurface report for foundation design.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Transportation Concurrency, and Surface Water Management approvals.

items.label: Administrative Documents
items.description: Include development orders, easement agreements, utility easements, engineering schedule of values, and signature affidavits.

permits.name: Vehicle Charging Station
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a vehicle charging station requires a Building Permit.

items.label: HOA/Condo Approval
items.description: Required if the installation is within a condominium or homeowners association.

items.label: Anchoring Details
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval, Miami-Dade NOA, or signed and sealed engineered plans for anchoring and tie-down details.

items.label: Electrical Plans & Calculations
items.description: Provide riser diagram, electrical plans, and load calculations for the charging station.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide installation manual and manufacturer specifications for the charging equipment.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide a survey or site plan showing the location of the charging station.

permits.name: Water Heater Changeout
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of a water heater, whether commercial or residential, requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: Only required when electrical work is associated with the water heater installation (e.g., new circuit, disconnect, wiring modifications, or conversion from gas to electric).

items.label: Water Heater Replacement Data Form
items.description: Completed Broward County Dwelling Unit Water Heater Replacement Data Form.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer cut sheets including equipment specifications and a Uniform Energy Factor (UEF) rating of 0.92 or greater for the proposed water heater.

permits.name: Water Service
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation or replacement of water service requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: State the type of piping material and size on the Plumbing Application.

permits.name: Window & Door Changeouts
permits.whenPermitRequired: The installation, replacement or major repair of any windows or doors requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for replacement of components that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: Retrofit Window & Door Schedule
items.description: Provide a detailed schedule identifying each window and door opening included in the permit. The schedule must document the size, type, location, and applicable product approval information for every opening to demonstrate compliance with required wind pressures and installation requirements.

links.label: Broward County Uniform Retrofit Window & Door Schedule

items.label: HOA / Condo Association Approval
items.description: Provide association approval letter if applicable.

items.label: Floor Plan Showing Openings
items.description: Submit a plan or drawing showing the location, size, and type of each window or door. A marked-up floor plan or a clear sketch is acceptable, provided the information is legible.

items.label: Product Approval Documents
items.description: Provide a current Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade Notice of Acceptance (NOA) for each window or door product being installed. The selected product must be clearly identified within the approval document by circling or highlighting it.

items.label: Wind Load Requirements and Design Pressures
items.description:
Provide documentation identifying the required design pressures for each window and door opening.

For structures with a mean roof height greater than 30 feet, site-specific design pressures are required. These must be prepared, signed, and sealed by a Florida Professional Engineer or Architect. Use of the voluntary chart or other standard tables is not permitted.

For structures with a mean roof height of 30 feet or less, required design pressures may be determined using the Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart in lieu of site-specific engineering, or may be provided by a signed and sealed document from a Florida Professional Engineer or Architect.

links.label: Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart

items.label: Egress Clearance Verification (Photos)
items.description:
Doors that swing outward onto an egress balcony or walkway must not reduce the required exit width by more than one-half when opened (typically at least 22 inches of clear width must remain when the door is open 90 degrees).

If this condition may be impacted, provide a photo showing the existing door and walkway for review.
